name: plugin install rejects when the plugin namespace folder already exists in _community for a different plugin
command: mkdir -p generated-code-quality-standards/_community/other-plugin/example-namespace stub-clones/acme/example/generated-code-quality-standards/example-namespace && printf 'name: example\nrules: [{id: foo, detector: x}]\n' > stub-clones/acme/example/plugin.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/plugin-install.sh" acme/example --gh-clone-stub stub-clones --rule-tester-stub pass 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -ne 0 ] && grep -q 'namespace_collision=example-namespace' err.txt && echo blocked 1>&2
